message:
chore: add *.orig and *.rej patch artifacts to .gitignore

Ignore patch conflict artifacts (.orig backup files and .rej rejected
hunks) left behind by failed merges, git am, or quilt operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -169,3 +169,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # NTM session state
 .ntm/
+
+# Patch artifacts (failed merges / quilt / git am)
+*.orig
+*.rej
